description_long: This object is a lifelike representation of a red fox, featuring a slender body covered in vibrant orange fur with a white underbelly and tail tip. The fox's head is sharply pointed with upright triangular ears and a narrow snout, while its legs are thin and black, giving it an agile appearance. The bushy tail is long and prominently marked with a white stripe along the top and tip, contrasting with the orange and black hues of the body. The eyes are small and dark, set forward on the face, and the overall posture suggests alertness and readiness to move. The surface appears smooth and slightly matte, with subtle shading to indicate fur texture. This animal would be commonly seen in urban parks, green spaces, or at the edge of neighborhoods.
description: A realistic red fox with orange fur, white underbelly and tail tip, black legs, and a bushy tail. The posture is alert and the surface is smooth with subtle fur details.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the orange back, white stripe running from head to tail, and the full bushy tail.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the fox's pointed snout, upright ears, slender legs, and the full length of the bushy tail.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the narrow face, forward-facing eyes, upright ears, and slim black legs.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to view 1, showing the opposite side of the body and tail, with the same color pattern.
